1 Unified code: C(2k,2*rho)

3 input k # k=3, rho=1 give C(6,2)

6
7 P[1] = (0, 2, 0)

9
10 # The second vertex is the starting point of the while loop

12
13 e = -1 # negative values indicate decreasing values in y or z direction
14 j = 2 # counter for vertices, starting with P[3]
15
16 while x < 2*k-1: # spiral part enlargement
17 e = -e
18 x = x+1; y = z-e; z = e*d; j = j+1; P[j] = (x,y,z)
19 x = x+1; z = -y; y = e*d; j = j+1; P[j] = (x,y,z)
20 end
